title: AuditEvent
description: Append-only audit event recording a create/update/delete/status-change on a registry entity (FR-032..FR-034). One document per event in the registry-audit Cosmos container.

entityId.description: Subject of the change. Cosmos partition key (/entityId).

principalId.description: Entra OID of the acting user.

fieldChanges.description: Field-level diff. Present on Updated and StatusChanged; null on Created and Deleted.

wasForceOverwrite.description: True iff the originating PUT carried _overwriteAcknowledged=true and the API detected a conflict (FR-020).

correlationId.description: W3C traceparent trace ID. Links back to the originating frontend trace in App Insights (FR-042, SC-012).
